introSection: Tidal Twist is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster at Columbus Zoo and Aquarium in Powell, Ohio, USA. It opened in July 2021.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The addition of Tidal Twist was announced on April 15, 2021. It would replace Redwood Falls, which was demolished earlier in the year.

In June 2021, it was announced that Tidal Twist would open the following month.

fullText:
Tidal Twist is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster at Columbus Zoo and Aquarium in Powell, Ohio, USA. It opened in July 2021.

The addition of Tidal Twist was announced on April 15, 2021. It would replace Redwood Falls, which was demolished earlier in the year.

In June 2021, it was announced that Tidal Twist would open the following month.
